problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: If Quantum tunneling through energy barrier is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
